heroes.tip: #1 EXP. Thunder for 1v1, Cloud for AoE teamfight.
THE utility jungler. Build full tank. Taunt peels, ult = absorbed damage burst.
6 unique combos. 1-2-3=burst, 2-1-3=CC, 3-2-1=sustain.
S1 displacement + execute is devastating. Controls space.
79% ban. Silence shuts skill heroes. Global darkness = info advantage.
Flicker+Ult = game-winning engage. Hide in bush, wait for 3+ grouped.

82% ban — highest. Damage unavoidable. First-pick if open.
Pick vs 2+ dash heroes. Each dash resets ult.
Can't jungle? Learn Haya. Shadow teleport = free escape.
Wall pin doubles stun. Fight near walls for max pressure.
Heavy stance = shield + burst. Alternate stances to poke then commit.
Nerfed 2.1.61 (33% regen cut) but still S. Jump stun ult = unmatched 1v1.
35% ban. Mount = unstoppable chase + AoE. Ban or pick.
Easiest assassin. See squishy alone → S1→S2→Ult = dead.
Nerfed 2.1.61 but still S. Ult zones entire areas. Stay MAX range.
Build MAGIC. Spray+move = constant damage while repositioning.
Nerfed 2.1.61 (10s from 15s) but still strong. Vision = info advantage.
Attach to carry = useless. Forces peel or lose damage dealer.
Global ult. Attach to jungler before ganks = guaranteed kills.
44% ban. Best roam for engage AND escape.
Rift geometry = instant kills when mastered. High skill ceiling.
Global ult = arrive everywhere first. Map pressure is insane.
Flicker+Ult kicks carry into team. Immune frames on S1.
Rising S40. Land S2 = guaranteed ult + burst = delete squishy.
Highest WR mage. Copy best enemy ult. Valentina+Tigreal ult = devastating.
Built-in Purify. Hit weakness points = untargetable ult.
THE tank killer. True damage ignores defense. 2+ tanks = pick Karrie.
Master 4 weapons: Sniper=poke, Shotgun=burst, SMG=sustain, Rocket=AoE.
DON'T build attack speed — fixed AA. Raw damage only.
S2 immunity dodges everything. Chain dashes for resets.
61% ban. Walls = unmatched mobility. Master energy management.
Highest skill ceiling. Khufra alone counters entire kit.
Flicker+Ult grabs 5 enemies. Pair with AoE damage.
Sleeper OP. Flicker+Ult = Tigreal-level engage. Unkillable w/o anti-heal.
Every enemy shield becomes your HP. Destroys shield comps.
THE CC counter. Press Ult when enemy Tigreal/Atlas engages.
Best healer. ALWAYS buy anti-heal vs Estes.
S40 newest. True damage from tank build. 3s stasis ult.
Master 6-bullet rhythm. Reload cancel = higher DPS.
10-dagger combo: S1→S2→S1→S2 return. Instant kill.
One hook on carry = win fight. Practice angles.
Without anti-heal he CANNOT die. Can jungle or EXP.
Ult rewinds HP/position = free death save. Very safe mid.
SECRET WEAPON. Low pick = never banned. Crit stacking is broken.
Rising. Ult stacks PERMANENTLY per kill. Snowball machine.
Ult = unkillable in zone. Great for beginners.
Dragon form = CC immune AoE beast. Anti-heal destroys him.
Arrow from fog = 3s stun. Practice trajectories.
Built-in purify on umbrella recall. Very high skill ceiling.
Ult prevents anyone approaching. Best vs dive comps.
Shield blocks ALL projectiles including ults.
Ring + Vengeance = massive reflected damage.
Sand walk heals. Long-range ult for engage/escape.
Wall trap + Ult in tight spaces is devastating.
Unique yo-yo swing = mobility + sustain.
Tank form CC → fly up → rain magic damage.
Best anti-heal tank. Passive reduces all enemy healing/shields.
Global ult dive + taunt. Great counter-engage.
Passive reflects damage. Counters dive. CC immune ult.
Ult = massive AoE DPS circle. Use monkey for positioning.
Invisible in bush. Silence on first stealth hit.
Light = sustain/invincibility. Dark = burst. Switch per situation.
Ult lets you manually target zones in real-time.
Global ult snipes across map. Stack passive for damage.
Ult = car form carrying an ally into enemies. Fun and effective.
Ult enables rapid dash spam. High-mobility mage.
Farm to max Bone Energy. Shreds tanks when stacked.
Engage bruiser AND healer. Immediate meta impact.
Classic late-game carry. Farm and melt everything.
Stay BEHIND team. Zero escape. Range is only defense.
Revamped 2.1.61 Superconductor. Rising pick. Great for beginners.
Bouncing AAs hit grouped enemies. CC immune shield passive.
Chain skills into enhanced versions for burst.
Sustain + true damage ult. More forgiving than flashy junglers.
Best beginner jungler. Spin, ult execute.
Stack blood orbs for permanent HP. Dive and drain.
Clones melt towers. Split push specialist.
3 HP bars = deceptively tanky. Insane tower push.
Ult = full immortality for seconds. Time it perfectly.
Nearly impossible to dive under tower. Safe laner.
Spray fire for area damage. Ult pulls and explodes.
Throw enemies into team or behind turrets.
Magic damage marksman. Reverse clone doubles DPS.
Long-range beam ult. Shield absorbs damage. Stay max range.
Matching marks stun. Ult teleports entire team.
Underrated. Speed boost for rotations. Ult stuns in line.
Only global heal ult support. Shares lantern item with ally.
Ult pins enemies vs walls. Use near terrain.
Split push king. Ult = immune to slows + massive speed.
Countered by anti-heal. Best in lower ranks.
Infinite stacking punch. Global ult. Weak early, scary late.
Was #1 ban Feb. Fallen but CC chain still devastating.
Human ranged → Wolf melee transform. Execute with wolf.
Ult traps enemies in prison zone.
Shark ult damages towers. Good for split push.
Drags enemy into 1v1 arena. Useless if they have escape.
Shreds armor for physical damage teams.
Ult zone prevents ALL dashes inside. Rising counter-pick.
Buffed in 2.1.61. Improved damage + CD.
Buffed 2.1.61. Long-range laser ult shreds grouped enemies.
Buffed 2.1.61. Choose CC or burst on each skill upgrade.
Buffed 2.1.61. Molina transforms enemies. Zone control queen.
Beginner-friendly jungler. Ult resets on kills. Build magic.
Teleport in, burst combo, teleport back out. Very safe mage jungler.
Spawn turret for zone control. Ult = mega turret mode.
Set traps for vision+CC. Kupa (wolf) provides extra DPS.
Long-range AA from stealth. Crit-based sniper. Weak vs dive.
AAs penetrate through enemies. Stun enemies against walls.
Nerfed 2.1.61 ult shard damage. Still viable. Invisible burst mage assassin.
Charge dash gives brief immunity. High skill ceiling EXP laner.
Biggest nerf this patch: S1+regen cut. Was S-tier, now B.
Buffed 2.1.61. Channeling ult deals massive AoE. Pair with Johnson.
Buffed 2.1.61. Stack passive → freeze + burst combo.
Buffed 2.1.61. Fast skill spam. Ult locks onto target.
Buffed 2.1.61. Brief immunity during skills. Ocean burst combo.
Buffed 2.1.61. Kill enemy → summon their clone to fight for you.
Buffed recently. Soul leaves body to assassinate. Protect your body.
Heal in normal mode. Rage mode = massive AoE CC.
Build walls to block paths. Strong early but falls off late.
Improved 2.1.61. Ult chains enemies — damage shared between linked targets.
Ult = resurrection zone. Allies who die inside revive instantly.
Each skill enhances next AA. Weave skills between autos.
Buffed in recent patch. Naruto collab hero. Dash combo fighter.
Buffed recently. Sasuke collab. Quick burst combo.
Tank form → ranged form transformation. Similar to Edith.
Grow by stacking passive. Ult devours enemy hero.
S+ ban priority. Suppress ult GRABS enemy and drags them. Guaranteed pick.
Passive stacks axe power on AAs. Slow start but devastating late game.
Stack blood early for infinite mana + huge range. Devastating with a peeling tank.
S2 knockback interrupts dashes — premier anti-assassin / anti-dash mage.
Fires while moving in beast form. Build attack speed + on-hit; kite forever.
Stack passive then combo squishies; charm sets up picks. Newer burst mage.
Zone-control mage — trap enemies in your domain and burst them down.

lanes.nt: 8 fighters S-tier. Sora leads. Phoveus = must counter-pick vs dashes.
13 mages buffed. Pool expanded 4→8+ viable. Eudora rising.
Utility junglers define meta. Tank jungling frees EXP for damage.
Farm & carry. Brody = rare early MM. Bruno = sleeper crit.
Flicker+Ult engage is king. Khufra anti-dash. Marcel competing.

teams.ds: Group & sustain. Need anti-heal to beat.

paths.name: Assassin Path (Blue Start)
paths.note: For energy/mana dependent assassins. Blue buff = sustain for ability spam. Hit level 4 by 1:45-2:00.

paths.name: Tank Jungler Path (Red Start)
paths.note: Red buff slow enhances ganks. Tank junglers don't need blue buff as urgently. Focus on enabling lanes.

paths.name: Aggressive Invade Path
paths.note: High risk/reward. Only when you have early lane priority. Track enemy jungler's gold on scoreboard.

paths.name: Fast Turtle Rush
paths.note: Fastest path to level 4 + Turtle. Requires team coordination. Get both buffs before 2:00 Turtle spawn.

timers.tip: Setup 15-20s before spawn. Lure toward your side. Retribution at red HP line.
Only take after winning fight or enemy dead. Vision 30-45s before. Never solo Lord.
Buff respawn at 75s = sync rotations for double buff before Turtle at 2:00.
Contest this for early gold lead. Position matters — river control wins early game.

tips: Hit Level 4 by 1:45-2:00 through optimized pathing
60/40 Rule: 60% farm, 40% ganks in first 8 minutes
Track enemy jungler gold: +23g = Purple Buff small, ~120g = Orange Buff taken
Gank priority: Squishy MMs/Mages without escape > EXP laners
After 5 min, lane minions outfarm camps (30-50g). Share lanes
Save Retribution for Turtle/Lord contests. Don't waste on small camps late
Ping 10-15s before engaging objectives for team coordination
Check minimap every 3-5 seconds. Missing enemy = potential ambush
After successful gank, push tower immediately while enemy respawns
Late game: give Blue Buff to mage, Red Buff to MM if they need it

heroes.note: AoE grab for wombo combo comps.
Utility tank JG defines the meta.
Safest pro JG pick. Shadow escape.
Immune frames clutch in pro play.
Artillery zoning. Nerfed but still picked.

tips: Pro teams average 2.5 Turtles per win — objective control is king
First-pick Mathilda or Sora = highest contested picks in MPL S15
Fredrinn's tank JG frees EXP lane for Julian/Sora damage builds
Pros track enemy gold to predict jungler location (+23g = small camp, ~120g = buff)
5-man Lord attempts only after winning a teamfight — never force
Marcel's Golden Hour (3s stasis) is being explored as an objective contest tool

glossary.def: Crowd Control — any effect that restricts movement or actions (stun, knock-up, slow, silence, suppress, freeze, root, taunt)
Protecting your carry by using CC/abilities to keep enemies away from them during fights
Attacking while moving backward to maintain distance from melee enemies pursuing you
Surprise attack on an enemy laner by rotating from another position (usually by JG or roam)
Moving from one area of the map to another to help teammates, contest objectives, or gank
Pushing a lane alone while your team pressures elsewhere, forcing enemies to split their defense
Aggressively engaging past enemy frontline to reach their backline carries, even under turret
Dealing damage from a safe distance without committing to a full fight
Dealing massive damage in a very short time window (usually a full skill combo)
Ability to heal/regenerate HP during fights through lifesteal, spell vamp, or abilities
Items that reduce enemy healing (Dominance Ice, Sea Halberd, Necklace of Durance)
Stats that ignore enemy defense. Physical PEN vs armor, Magic PEN vs magic resist
Cooldown Reduction — reduces time between skill uses. Capped at 40% (45% with Enchanted Talisman)
Heal a percentage of damage dealt by skills (NOT basic attacks — that's lifesteal)
Damage that ignores ALL defense. Cannot be reduced by armor or magic resist
Battle spell for junglers. Deals damage to camps and is used to secure Turtle/Lord (last-hit)
Battle spell that teleports you a short distance. Used for engage (Flicker+Ult) or escape
Walking into an unwarded bush to see if enemies are hiding there. Dangerous if done carelessly
Keeping the minion wave near your turret by only last-hitting. Safe farming technique
Building up a large minion wave by only killing caster minions, then crashing it into enemy turret
Intercepting enemy minions between turrets before they reach your minions. Denies enemy farm
Staying very close to your turret for protection when behind or under threat
Turrets, Turtle, Lord — things that give permanent advantages. Always more important than kills
Exchanging damage or objectives with the enemy. Good trades give you more value than you lose
A hero that can play multiple roles/lanes, making it hard for enemies to counter-pick in draft
Heroes picked in the first phase of draft. Usually the most contested/versatile picks
Choosing a hero specifically because their kit counters an enemy hero already picked
A late-game damage dealer (usually MM) that the entire team protects and enables to carry
Hero who starts fights (usually tank). Responsible for finding good engage angles
Squishy damage dealers (MM, Mage) who stay behind the frontline during fights
Tanky heroes (Tank, Fighter) who absorb damage and CC at the front of teamfights
Building an early lead and using it to grow the advantage faster (kills→towers→objectives→more kills)
Winning a game from behind, usually by defending well and winning a crucial Lord/teamfight
Most Valuable Player — awarded post-game based on performance metrics (KDA, damage, objectives)
Kills / Deaths / Assists — the primary performance metric shown on scoreboard
Most Effective Tactics Available — the currently strongest heroes, strategies, and team compositions

goals: Complete all tutorials and training modes
Learn the map layout — 3 lanes, jungle, river, turrets
Pick 1 easy hero and play 20+ games with them
Understand basic roles: Tank, Fighter, Assassin, Mage, Marksman, Support
Learn to last-hit minions for gold
Don't chase kills into fog — turrets matter more than kills
learn.heroes: Layla, Miya, Tigreal, Eudora, Balmond, Zilong
learn.focus: Survival. Don't die. That's the #1 skill to learn.

goals: Master 2-3 heroes per role you enjoy
Learn the item shop — start with recommended builds, then understand why
Learn when to push tower after kills
Start checking minimap every 5-10 seconds
Learn what each role does and how lanes work
Understand Turtle (2:00) and Lord (9:00) timing
learn.heroes: Saber, Freya, Pharsa, Bruno, Angela, Franco
learn.focus: Map awareness. Glance at minimap constantly.

goals: Draft Pick mode — learn to counter-pick and communicate roles
Master counter-building (anti-heal, armor, magic resist per match)
Learn wave management (freeze, slow push, cut lane)
Understand emblem talents and optimize per hero/matchup
Learn 2+ roles so you can fill when needed
Start tracking objectives: contest every Turtle, coordinate Lord
learn.heroes: Chou, Hayabusa, Khufra, Valentina, Wanwan, Mathilda
learn.focus: Adaptation. Change builds, spells, and playstyle per match.

goals: Master macro: wave timing, rotation patterns, objective sequencing
Learn to predict enemy movements via gold tracking on scoreboard
Shot-call objectives for your team via pings
Maintain a 55-60% win rate on your main heroes
Master 2-3 flex picks that work in multiple lanes/roles
Review replays of losses — find your recurring mistakes
learn.heroes: Sora, Julian, Fredrinn, Zhuxin, Phoveus, Atlas
learn.focus: Macro > Micro. Game sense wins more than mechanics.

goals: Master draft phase — understand 10-ban system, flex picks, counter-rotations
Lead team communication — call ganks, objectives, retreats
Track ALL enemy cooldowns mentally (ults, Purify, Flicker, Retribution)
Perfect your laning phase — first 3 minutes should feel automatic
Build hero pool of 7-10 heroes across 3+ roles
Study MPL pro matches for rotation patterns and draft strategies
learn.heroes: All S/S+ tier heroes. Flex between roles.
learn.focus: Leadership. Your calls win or lose games at this level.

t3.e: After skill, deal HP-based magic DMG in area
t3.use: DEFAULT for tanks. Scales with HP items.

t3.e: Heal when landing CC on enemies
Mark enemies → allies deal +6% DMG to them
Skills deal %HP magic DMG + mana regen
AA triggers MS boost + HP sustain
Mark enemies → allies +6% DMG to them

rotation.tp: Don't steal last hits. Gold comes from assists + roam passive.
Position near enemy mid turret to deny enemy roamer gold.
Turtle is NON-NEGOTIABLE. If team fights for Turtle, you MUST be there.
After 5 min, help carries push waves — minions outvalue jungle camps.
One bad Lord fight = game over. Only Lord after winning teamfight.

tips: Check bushes BEFORE team walks through — you're the tank
Ward river between mid/sides — highest value vision
Ward Turtle/Lord 15-20s before spawn
Check minimap every 3-5 seconds
Track enemy jungler via buff timers
Ping 'Enemy Missing' immediately
Never face-check deep fog when enemies missing
Vision at jungle entrances enables safe invades

r: Laners: Last-hit minions. 15 min farming > chasing kills
Jungler: Level 4 by 1:45. Gank nearest lane. Turtle at 2:00
Roamer: Vision, escort JG, protect gold lane MM
Push tower after kills — turrets = permanent gold advantage
DON'T chase into fog. DON'T overstay after kills
Contest EVERY Turtle — gold/XP compounds over time
After 5 min, lane minions > jungle camps. Share waves
Group 3-4 for turret pushes. Leave 1 in opposite lane
Rotate to lane where you got a kill — push that tower
Counter-build: check enemy items, buy anti-heal/armor/MR
Lord at 9:00. Only after winning fight or enemy dead
One death = 40-60s timer. One bad fight loses the game
Stick with team. Solo farming late = getting picked off
Push with Lord immediately — don't recall
If behind: defend turrets. Trade objectives. Don't force lost fights

t: Last-hit for max gold — don't auto-push mindlessly
Freeze wave near YOUR turret when behind
Slow push (big wave) then rotate for numbers advantage
Watch minimap — missing enemy = ganking someone
Turrets > Kills > Camps. Push after kills ALWAYS
Enemy used Retribution on camp? 35s free contest window
Tanks engage first. Carries stay BEHIND frontline
Focus enemy carry (MM/Mage), NOT the tank
Peel for YOUR carry if enemy dives them
Wait for key CDs before engaging (Diggie ult, Purify, WoN)
Master 2-3 heroes per role. Don't play everything
Counter-build every match. Check enemy items
Mute toxic players. Tilt = bad decisions = lost stars
Review losses: died to ganks? Wrong items? Missed objectives?

antiHeal.when: Buy when enemy has sustain hero (Estes, Uranus, Ruby, Yu Zhong, Alucard, Alice, Thamuz, Esmeralda)
antiHeal.tip: Buy as 2nd-3rd item. Team should have 1-2 anti-heal items vs sustain comps.

changes.text: +12% pick — Ult kills from higher HP
